deals.deal: 🎆 Independence Day Free Doughnut — Wear Red, White & Blue
deals.desc: Walk into any participating Krispy Kreme on July 4 wearing red, white, and blue and score one free Original Glazed doughnut — no purchase required.

deals.deal: 🎆 $2.50 Original Glazed Dozen with Any Dozen Purchase
deals.desc: Use code USA online or in-app through July 5 to add an Original Glazed dozen for just $2.50 when you buy any dozen or 16-count Minis at regular price.

deals.deal: 🎆 $2.50 Whopper Jr. — July 4th America 250 Special
deals.desc: Royal Perks members can grab a Whopper Jr. for just $2.50 on July 4 when ordering through the BK app or BK.com.

deals.deal: 🎆 America $2.50 Menu — Jr. Cheeseburger, Hot Dog, Rings & Float
deals.desc: Through July 12, snag the Jr. Double Cheeseburger, All-American Hot Dog, medium Onion Rings, or the Red, White & Blue Slush Float for just $2.50 each.

deals.deal: 🎆 'Finger Lickin' Fourth' — 12-Piece Bucket for $15
deals.desc: Score a 12-piece bucket of KFC's famous fried chicken for only $15 as part of its limited-time Fourth of July promotion.

deals.deal: 🎆 $3 Medium Refreshers After 1 PM — July 4th Week
deals.desc: Get any medium Dunkin' Refresher for just $3 after 1 PM daily through July 7 — no code needed at participating locations.

deals.deal: 🎆 Firework Frappuccino — Limited-Edition 4th of July Drink
deals.desc: Celebrate America's 250th with Starbucks' new red, white, and blue Firework Frappuccino — available now through July 7 at participating stores.

deals.deal: 🎆 $2.50 Stars & Stripes Misty Slush Float
deals.desc: DQ's patriotic cherry and blue-raspberry slush float topped with soft-serve and star sprinkles is just $2.50 through July 5 — rewards members also earn 250 bonus points.

deals.deal: Summer of Extras — Free Entrées & Exclusive Offers All July
deals.desc: Chipotle Rewards members who opt in unlock free entrées, bonus points, and weekly Rewards Exchange deals through August 31 — July is the second of three months.

deals.deal: $6 Big Box — 2 Chicken Pieces, 2 Sides & Biscuit
deals.desc: Popeyes' $6 Big Box is back nationwide through July 13, packing two pieces of chicken or three tenders, two sides, and a buttermilk biscuit into one deal.

deals.deal: $9.99 Any Pizza Deal — Includes Parmesan Stuffed Crust
deals.desc: Pizza Hut's $9.99 Any Pizza deal is back through July 26, now including Parmesan Stuffed Crust at no extra charge — order online or in-app.

deals.deal: $7.99 Carryout Special — Any 1-Topping Pizza or Wings
deals.desc: Pick up any 1-topping medium pizza, 8-piece wings, or boneless chicken for $7.99 each via the Domino's carryout deal (some areas $8.99 for 2-topping).

deals.deal: Free Small Frosty with Any $5 App Purchase
deals.desc: Wendy's is giving away a free small Frosty with any $5 purchase made through the Wendy's app from July 1 through July 7.

deals.deal: Free Any-Size Fries with $3 App Purchase — Weekly
deals.desc: Royal Perks members get a free any-size fry every week with a $3+ purchase when ordering through the BK app — an ongoing recurring deal.

deals.deal: $1.99 Sliders — Roast Beef, Chicken & More
deals.desc: Arby's new $1.99 Sliders lineup offers roast beef, buffalo chicken, chicken, and ham, each packed with 10–11g of protein — available nationwide now.

deals.deal: Luxe Cravings Box — Chalupa, Burrito, Taco, Chips & Drink for $7
deals.desc: The Taco Bell app's Luxe Cravings Box packs a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips & nacho cheese, and a medium drink for $7.

deals.deal: $3 Off Any Smoothie 20 oz or Larger — Rewards Members
deals.desc: Healthy Rewards members can claim $3 off any smoothie 20 oz or larger via the Smoothie King app — verified active this week.

deals.deal: Free Smoothie After First Tropic Rewards App Purchase
deals.desc: Download the Tropical Smoothie Cafe app, join Tropic Rewards, and earn a free smoothie credited to your account after your first qualifying purchase.

deals.deal: Free Chips & Guac for New Chipotle Rewards Members
deals.desc: New Chipotle Rewards members get free chips and guacamole after their first order when they sign up and opt in via the Chipotle app — available all summer.

deals.deal: MyPanera Exclusive: New Iced Coffee Flavors — Hazelnut Mocha, Rocky Road & Snickerdoodle
deals.desc: MyPanera rewards members get exclusive access to three new seasonal Iced Coffees — Hazelnut Mocha, Rocky Road, and Snickerdoodle — only via the app.

deals.deal: 🎆 Patriotic 4th of July Menu — Rocket Pop Donut & Dazzleberry Coolatta
deals.desc: Dunkin' is serving a full America 250 lineup including the Rocket Pop Donut, Dazzleberry Coolatta, Strawberry Sparkler Cloud Latte, and Starlight Lemonade — available now through the holiday weekend.

deals.deal: Weekday $10 Bucket of the Day — Mon–Fri
deals.desc: KFC app members unlock a different $10 chicken bucket each weekday — nuggets Monday/Friday, legs & thighs Tuesday, tenders Thursday, and wings Wednesday.

deals.deal: $10 Smoothie Bowls In-App — Acai & More
deals.desc: Select Jamba smoothie bowls are available for $10 when the promotional price is shown in the app or website at participating U.S. locations.
